name: Pyrana
description: Chew through the enemy with this vicious automatic hand shotgun.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Chew through the enemy with this vicious automatic hand shotgun.

components.name: Control Module
components.description:
Autonomy processor for Robotics. A Corpus design.

Location: Europa, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Pyrana Prime’s passive not animating correctly. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1085383-pyrana-primes-passive-not-animating-correctly/

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Chroma Prime, Gram Prime, and Rubico Prime Relics have replaced all exclusive locations of Limbo Prime, Destreza Prime, and Pyrana Prime Relics:
*Limbo Prime, Destreza Prime, and Pyrana Prime Relics are also still out in the wild, just not in exclusive spots like Bounties or Onslaught.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Pyrana Prime auto-switching to another weapon when the magazine empties.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Pyrana Primes ethereal buff being permanent by Transferring to the Operator while the ethereal Pyrana buff runs out.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.3 - Limbo Prime
patchlogs.changes: Limbo Prime, Destreza Prime, and Pyrana Prime Relics have replaced all locations of Zephyr Prime, Tiberon Prime, and Kronen Prime Relics:

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Increased ammo capacity of Pyrana in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Changed Pyrana’s Mag to 10 in Conclave to match PvE values.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Brakk, Bronco series, Detron series, Castanas Series and Pyrana are now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.1.2
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the amount of reverb heard on the Pyrana sound effects.
Increased the volume of the Pyrana reload sound effect.
